/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_exec.dir/spatial_bicycle_models.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_exec.dir/reference_path.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_exec.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_exec.dir/MPC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_exec.dir/csv_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_exec.dir/odom_loader.cpp.o -o test_exec   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -lOsqpEigen -losqp
